chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.S-290 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.841/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 05.12.2025 ************** 1. Deferred for the time being. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Similar situation was observed on the previous date of hearing, i.e., 13.11.2025. It appears that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in diligently pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E M.Ali*
